# Compute auxiliary-loss-free expert statistics

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This mixture-of-experts translation keeps routing scores, indices, counts, and expert values in tile operations.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/moe/aux_fi_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/moe/aux_fi_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `group_count`, `aux_fi` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="group_count_aux_fi_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int NumGroups, int TileM = 16>
void group_count(std::int32_t *group_idx, std::int32_t *out) {
    static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0 && NumGroups > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0 && NumGroups % 8 == 0, "NumTopk/NumGroups must be multiple of 8");
    constexpr int kTM = NumTokens / TileM;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_idx = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
    using gm_out = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<1, NumGroups>>;
    using tile_idx = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_hist = LocalTile< std::int32_t, 1, NumGroups, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, NumGroups>;
    using tile_rowcnt = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileM, 1>;
    using it_idx = global_iterator<gm_idx, tile_idx>;
    using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_hist>;
    it_idx idx_iter(group_idx); it_out out_iter(out);

    tile_hist grand; TEXPANDS(grand, 0);
    for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
        auto gidx = idx_iter(tm, 0);
        tile_idx idx; TLOAD(idx, gidx);
        tile_hist tile_total; TEXPANDS(tile_total, 0);
        for (int e = 0; e < NumGroups; ++e) {
            tile_idx e_bc, one, cnt, mask; tile_rowcnt rowcnt;
            TEXPANDS(e_bc, e); TEXPANDS(one, 1); TEXPANDS(cnt, 0);
            TCMP(mask, idx, e_bc);
            TSEL(cnt, mask, one);
            TROWSUM(rowcnt, cnt);
            TINSERT(tile_total, rowcnt, 0, e);
        }
        TADD(grand, grand, tile_total);
    }
    auto gout = out_iter(0, 0);
    TSTORE(gout, grand);
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load a routing fragment, apply selection, counting, normalization, gather, or reduction stages, and store the fragment in token-major or expert-major order.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TADD`](../../../intrinsics/tadd.md), [`TCMP`](../../../intrinsics/tcmp.md), [`TCVT`](../../../intrinsics/tcvt.md), [`TEXPANDS`](../../../intrinsics/texpands.md), [`TINSERT`](../../../intrinsics/tinsert.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TROWSUM`](../../../intrinsics/trowsum.md), [`TSEL`](../../../intrinsics/tsel.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition tokens or experts; threads own disjoint routing fragments of at least 128 bytes and derive their coordinates from execution identity.

## Memory and tile flow

Scores and indices are loaded into typed tiles, transformed through the routing pipeline, and committed through regular or indexed tile memory operations.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

??? code "group_count_aux_fi_pto.hpp"

    ```cpp title="group_count_aux_fi_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_GROUP_COUNT_AUX_FI_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_GROUP_COUNT_AUX_FI_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int NumGroups, int TileM = 16>
    void group_count(std::int32_t *group_idx, std::int32_t *out) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0 && NumGroups > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0 && NumGroups % 8 == 0, "NumTopk/NumGroups must be multiple of 8");
        constexpr int kTM = NumTokens / TileM;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_idx = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
        using gm_out = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<1, NumGroups>>;
        using tile_idx = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_hist = LocalTile< std::int32_t, 1, NumGroups, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, NumGroups>;
        using tile_rowcnt = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileM, 1>;
        using it_idx = global_iterator<gm_idx, tile_idx>;
        using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_hist>;
        it_idx idx_iter(group_idx); it_out out_iter(out);

        tile_hist grand; TEXPANDS(grand, 0);
        for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
            auto gidx = idx_iter(tm, 0);
            tile_idx idx; TLOAD(idx, gidx);
            tile_hist tile_total; TEXPANDS(tile_total, 0);
            for (int e = 0; e < NumGroups; ++e) {
                tile_idx e_bc, one, cnt, mask; tile_rowcnt rowcnt;
                TEXPANDS(e_bc, e); TEXPANDS(one, 1); TEXPANDS(cnt, 0);
                TCMP(mask, idx, e_bc);
                TSEL(cnt, mask, one);
                TROWSUM(rowcnt, cnt);
                TINSERT(tile_total, rowcnt, 0, e);
            }
            TADD(grand, grand, tile_total);
        }
        auto gout = out_iter(0, 0);
        TSTORE(gout, grand);
    }

    template <int NumTokens, int NumTopk, int NumExperts, int TileM = 16>
    void aux_fi(std::int32_t *topk_idx, float *out, int num_aux_topk) {
        static_assert(NumTokens > 0 && NumTopk > 0 && NumExperts > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(NumTopk % 8 == 0 && NumExperts % 8 == 0, "NumTopk/NumExperts must be multiple of 8");
        constexpr int kTM = NumTokens / TileM;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_idx = global_tensor<std::int32_t, RowMajor<NumTokens, NumTopk>>;
        using gm_out = global_tensor<float, RowMajor<1, NumExperts>>;
        using tile_idx = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, NumTopk, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_hist_i = LocalTile< std::int32_t, 1, NumExperts, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, NumExperts>;
        using tile_hist_f = LocalTile< float, 1, NumExperts, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, NumExperts>;
        using tile_rowcnt = LocalTile< std::int32_t, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileM, 1>;
        using it_idx = global_iterator<gm_idx, tile_idx>;
        using it_out = global_iterator<gm_out, tile_hist_f>;
        it_idx idx_iter(topk_idx); it_out out_iter(out);
        float scale = static_cast<float>(NumExperts) /
                      static_cast<float>(NumTokens * (num_aux_topk > 0 ? num_aux_topk : 1));

        tile_hist_i grand; TEXPANDS(grand, 0);
        for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
            auto gidx = idx_iter(tm, 0);
            tile_idx idx; TLOAD(idx, gidx);
            tile_hist_i tile_total; TEXPANDS(tile_total, 0);
            for (int e = 0; e < NumExperts; ++e) {
                tile_idx e_bc, one, cnt, mask; tile_rowcnt rowcnt;
                TEXPANDS(e_bc, e); TEXPANDS(one, 1); TEXPANDS(cnt, 0);
                TCMP(mask, idx, e_bc);
                TSEL(cnt, mask, one);
                TROWSUM(rowcnt, cnt);
                TINSERT(tile_total, rowcnt, 0, e);
            }
            TADD(grand, grand, tile_total);
        }
        tile_hist_f gf, of;
        TCVT(gf, grand);
        TMULS(of, gf, scale);
        auto gout = out_iter(0, 0);
        TSTORE(gout, of);
    }

    }
    #endif
    ```
